evals.name: null-pointer-bug
evals.prompt: Fix this bug in my TypeScript code. I'm getting 'TypeError: Cannot read property "id" of undefined' when calling getUserProfile. The error happens in the auth middleware. Stack trace points to line 45 in src/middleware/auth.ts. Expected: should return user profile. Actual: crashes with undefined error.
evals.expected_output: Should investigate the null pointer bug, find root cause, implement minimal fix, and suggest/add regression tests

evals.name: race-condition-bug
evals.prompt: There's a race condition in our payment processing. Sometimes users get charged twice for the same order. It happens intermittently when the payment gateway is slow to respond. The order status gets updated in the database but the response times out, so the frontend retries. This is a production issue affecting real customers.
evals.expected_output: Should identify as race condition, analyze async code flow, propose idempotency solution, check for similar patterns elsewhere

evals.name: failing-test-bug
evals.prompt: Fix failing test in UserService.test.ts. Test 'should create user with valid email' started failing after yesterday's deploy. Error: 'Expected email to be lowercase, got "TEST@EXAMPLE.COM"'. Nothing changed in the test file. Recent commits touched the email validation module.
evals.expected_output: Should use git to find recent changes, identify regression cause, implement minimal fix, ensure test passes, check for other affected tests
